🎮 Complete Controls

WASD/Arrow Keys - Walk
Shift + WASD - Run
E - Enter/Exit Vehicle
Space/Click - Shoot
Mouse - Look Around
🎭 Emote Controls:
B - Toggle Emote Menu
Ctrl + 1-9 - Quick Emotes
Ctrl + R - Random Emote
Walking Speed: 6 km/h
Running Speed: 18 km/h
500+ Emotes Available
